headline: Elevance Health Names Best in Class Primary Care Practices in Care Provider Recognition Program
summary: INDIANAPOLIS, May 01, 2026--Elevance Health, along with its affiliated health plans, today announced 45 distinguished medical practices and health systems to be honored in its annual Care Provider Recognition Program. The program spotlights the top one percent of primary care providers in Elevance Health’s nationwide affiliated health plan network of about 7,200 value-based care and evaluated provider partners.

headline: Does Elevance Health’s (ELV) Massive Buybacks and EPS Guidance Reframe Its Medicaid Margin Story?
summary: In April 2026, Elevance Health reported first-quarter revenue of US$50.18 billion, down in profitability with diluted EPS from continuing operations of US$8.00, while also setting at-least US$19.85 full-year diluted EPS guidance, affirming a US$1.72 quarterly dividend, and completing a long-running buyback program that has repurchased over US$53.79 billion in shares. Despite weaker quarterly earnings, renewed analyst confidence in future Medicaid margin recovery and Elevance’s ongoing...
